label: green-600 text on white fails WCAG AA at 3.30:1
Tooltip icons too small (14px) and low contrast (2.54:1)
Currency selector shows all 5 currencies upfront
No first-trade walkthrough banner for novices
Sell validation errors appear as auto-dismissing toasts
Limit price field has no guidance on pricing
Price refreshes silently every 5s with no indicator
Account dropdown shows full account numbers
Minimum quantity notice at bottom, easy to miss
